parameters.formDescription: Generate animated B-roll graphics from a transcript. Fill in the details below and submit.

values.placeholder: Paste your full transcript with timestamps here...

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 8000, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userMessage }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody:
=B-Roll Generated

${s.type}${JSON.stringify(s.data).substring(0,80)}...${(s.from/30).toFixed(1)}s–${((s.from+s.durationInFrames)/30).toFixed(1)}s
`).join('') }}

Full JSON Config
